name: Mobile App Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile and desktop apps with React Native, Flutter, and Electron.

playlists.title: React Native Course for Beginners
playlists.creator: freeCodeCamp.org
playlists.description: A beginner-friendly React Native course covering components, navigation, styling, and app fundamentals.

playlists.title: React Native Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.creator: Programming with Mosh
playlists.description: Learn React Native basics and build mobile UI with practical examples.

playlists.title: Flutter Course for Beginners
playlists.creator: freeCodeCamp.org
playlists.description: Comprehensive Flutter introduction covering Dart basics, widgets, layouts, and app building.

playlists.title: Flutter Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.creator: The Net Ninja
playlists.description: A step-by-step Flutter playlist that helps you build apps while learning core concepts.

playlists.title: Electron JS Crash Course
playlists.creator: Traversy Media
playlists.description: A practical introduction to building desktop apps with Electron using web technologies.

playlists.title: Build a Desktop App with Electron
playlists.creator: freeCodeCamp.org
playlists.description: Learn the Electron workflow by building a desktop app with JavaScript and modern tooling.
